dashboard.title: L2 Planner Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitors L2 hybrid planner performance, escalation rates, and learning flywheel progress

panels.title: L2 Invocation Rate
panels.description: Number of L2 planner invocations over time

panels.title: Escalation Rate (L2 → L3)
panels.description: Rate of escalations from L2 to L3 (human). Should decrease over time.

panels.title: Confidence Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of L2 plan confidence scores

panels.title: Learned Rules Count
panels.description: Total number of rules in the learned rule registry

panels.title: Rules Promoted to L0
panels.description: Number of learned rules promoted to L0 deterministic planner

panels.title: Layer Distribution
panels.description: Breakdown of requests handled by each layer (L0/L1/L2/L3)

panels.title: Average Latency
panels.description: Average L2 planning latency in milliseconds

panels.title: Learning Flywheel Progress
panels.description: Escalation rate over time — should trend downward as the system learns
